_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.

event_queue.event: Q1 FY2027 earnings on 2026-05-27 (post-close). Consensus $2.40B revenue / $0.79-0.80 EPS; options pricing ~15% move. ATH $196.33 close (May 22). Citi $215, Melius $220, Stifel $210, Wolfe $210. Custom ASIC $1.5B in FY2026, guiding >20% YoY FY2027, doubling FY2028. Celestial AI $3.25B acquisition (Feb 2, Photonic Fabric) captured Session 17. Session 18 pre-earnings final: 50+ design wins, 'Switzerland of interconnect' framing confirmed. Session 19: ESUN competitive context added to ALAB entity. Post-earnings priority: re-run DCF and revise story_narrative — current IV $119.91 is pre-guide stale.

_event_queue_note: Session 19 (2026-05-25, Memorial Day second session): MRVL entity current — no new material pre-earnings developments. Key Phase 1 finds: ASML–Tata Electronics India MoU (May 16, retroactive) added to ASML entity; ALAB ESUN competitive risk (Oct 2025, retroactive) added to ALAB entity — Arista enters scale-up switching 2027, previously caused ALAB -15%, stock since recovered to $305+ on Amazon Trainium3 wins. Taiwan Strait elevated in April (202 aircraft, carrier transit). TrendForce Q2 DRAM +63% confirmed. Phase 1b/1c both gated (19%3=1, 19%6=1). Samsung vote closes May 27 KST; markets reopen May 26. Session 20 = post-earnings MRVL DCF (after May 27 close).
